# Nebrasketball
Fan-operated aggregator for Nebraska Cornhuskers gear across ALL sports.
Indexes products from Amazon, eBay, Etsy, Fanatics, and independent fan shops.
Launched March 2026 during Nebraska's historic first-ever Sweet 16 basketball run.
Not affiliated with the University of Nebraska or NCAA.

## Sports Covered
Football, Basketball, Volleyball, Wrestling, Baseball, Softball, Track & Field, and general Cornhuskers gear.

## Pages
/ — Homepage with featured gear, sport grid, and latest news
/gear — All-sports hub: browse by sport
/gear/[sport] — Sport landing pages: football, basketball, volleyball, wrestling, baseball, softball, track, general
/gear/[sport]/[filter] — Sport + category or price range (e.g. /gear/football/hoodies, /gear/basketball/under-25)
/shop — Full product search with PicClick-style masonry grid, filter by category and source
/category/[slug] — Gear filtered by type: tees, hoodies, hats, jerseys, womens, youth, accessories
/product/[slug] — Individual product pages with affiliate links to Amazon, eBay, Etsy, Fanatics
/gift-guides — Gift guide hub for Husker fans
/gift-guides/[slug] — Individual gift guides (football, basketball, volleyball, under-25, under-50, etc.)
/news — Nebraska sports news, game recaps, tournament updates
/news/[slug] — Individual articles
/legal — Legal terms, trademark disclaimer, affiliate disclosure, privacy policy

## Programmatic SEO
50,000+ potential pages generated from sport x category x price range x brand combinations.
Pages are dynamically generated when product counts meet minimum thresholds.

## Data
Products updated every 6 hours via automated ingestion from eBay, Etsy, and Amazon PA API.
All affiliate links marked rel="sponsored"
Click tracking: anonymous, no PII collected

## Contact
Site: nebrasketball.com
Built with Next.js, Supabase, Vercel
